refs.purpose: Interpret nf-test profiles and fixture conventions before mapping declared fixtures onto Galaxy inputs.
refs.trigger: When reading `test_fixtures` / `nf_tests` to decide which profile's fixtures best cover the workflow inputs.
refs.verification: Map nf-core/bacass declared fixtures onto its Galaxy interface and confirm this note improves profile/fixture selection.

refs.purpose: Interpret nf-test profiles and fixture conventions before mapping declared fixtures onto Galaxy inputs.
refs.trigger: When reading `test_fixtures` / `nf_tests` to decide which profile's fixtures best cover the workflow inputs.

refs.purpose: Map each declared fixture to an addressable Galaxy input label and the collection shape it must populate.
refs.trigger: When mapping a declared fixture (often a samplesheet-driven input) onto a Galaxy input's collection shape.

refs.purpose: Express each ref remote-URL-first with SHA-1 integrity and per-input collection layout when recording resolved fixtures.
Input contract: read the selected profile's `test_fixtures.inputs[]` and the `nf_tests[]` enumeration — role, url/path, sha1, filetype — as the declared source of test data.

produces.description: Test data resolved from the pipeline's declared fixtures, expressed as URLs/paths plus expected shapes for downstream test authoring. Shared id with [[find-test-data]] — the branch's search fallback fills only the inputs this Mold leaves unresolved.

consumes.description: Structured Nextflow summary from [[summarize-nextflow]]; carries the selected profile's `test_fixtures` and the full `nf_tests[]` enumeration — each declared input a role plus url/path, sha1, and filetype.
Galaxy interface brief from [[nextflow-summary-to-galaxy-interface]] pinning the workflow input labels, collection shapes, and datatypes each resolved fixture must map onto.
